keyDecisions: File sharing dropped from v1.0 scope - deferred to future
Teams SDK v2 over deprecated botbuilder v4
Claude Agent SDK streaming input mode (AsyncIterable) for persistent sessions
Read-only tools as default; write/bash require explicit opt-in
canUseTool callback routes permission requests to Adaptive Cards
MS Dev Tunnels primary, ngrok fallback
Personal chat scope only in v1.0; channel scope deferred
Single-tenant Azure AD bot registration
Config in ~/.cc-ms-teams/ with 0600 permissions
500ms streaming batch interval default
Zod schemas for config validation
esbuild single-file bundle
openQuestions: MCP endpoint exposure: local-only vs tunnel (currently local-only)
Azure CLI automation for bot registration in setup wizard
